text: EXTRAORDINARY «rm ii—mr^ 3—3iT-^rg- (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY tf- 797] ^rf T^rft, #"q^TT, 3T&H 26, 2010/^r TR§' 6, 1932 No. 7971 NEW DELHI, MONDAY, APRIL 26, 20I0/VAISAKHA 6, 1932 ( *TTTtT^ UgHfrlfclH ^T *l^fHi| ) 3Tfy*£cHI ^ f ^ r f t , 23 3T^T, 2010 ^T.3TT. 957(3T).—^sfa TOWC l ^ K I -*H'|UHI 3}ft#Wq, 1948 (1948 ^T 37) W\ WU TJ5 SRI U^T glferf ^T spprfm W p ^ P f a \ ^ i t % *ITO^fr ^H'IUHI 20i l ^ ^ M ^ s ^ r t ^i4*dmT^ ^ I < T H ^fcre;^feTF^TCWT ^ t T F ^ »--mi 7 ^ ^ 7^ ^ W 4 3 ^ f c r m*m ^ t vifad-Mi' ^TT 31^-NVI sfft ft%n ^ T T I [ m U 9/7/2009 -*M C#T) | MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS (OFFICE OF THE REGISTRAR GENERAL, INDIA) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the23rd April, 2010 S.O. 957(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 7G of the Census Act, 1948 (37 of 1948), the Cental- Government hereby directs that the Director of Census Operations for each State and Union Territory and the District Magistrates for the Districts falling under their jurisdiction shall exercise and discharge the powers of the Central Government with regard to Sections 7A to 7F of the Census Act, 1948 in connection with the conduct of all activities of Census of India, 2011.
